title: Smoky Papaya Salad
description: A spicy and sour Thai-inspired salad made with grilled papaya, smoky flavors and crunchy texture.
instructions: 1. Cut the papaya into small pieces and grill until slightly charred.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine the smoky sauce, Thai chilies, fish sauce, lime juice, and tum.
3. Blend until smooth and adjust the seasoning as needed.
4. In a large bowl, combine the grilled papaya, cilantro, and crushed peanuts.
5. Pour the blended sauce over the papaya mixture and toss to combine.
6. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
